daytime: The street is bright under the daytime sky.
The daytime sun shines directly on the road.
Light clouds drift above the quiet daytime street.
The road is dry and warm in the daytime.
The street feels calm in the midday daylight.
night: The street is quiet under the night sky.
The road is dark with only a few night lights.
Late at night, the road feels empty and still.
Faint city lights glow along the night street.
A few headlights pass through the silent night road.
sunset: The road glows softly under the sunset sky.
A warm orange hue covers the sunset street.
The setting sun casts a golden tone on the sunset road.
The sky above the street turns red during sunset.
Dusk settles slowly over the sunset road.
rain: Raindrops scatter across the rainy street.
The street is slick under steady rain.
Dark clouds gather above the rainy road.
The road glistens with fresh rainwater during the rain.
Light rain continues to fall on the rainy street.
fog: The road fades into thick fog.
A dense fog covers the foggy street.
The street is hidden behind a wall of fog.

The road is barely visible through the heavy fog.
snow: Snow blankets the snowy road in soft white.
The street is covered in a thin layer of snow.
Light snowflakes drift onto the snowy road.
The road is icy and dusted with fresh snow.
Snow falls steadily over the snowy street.
cloudy: Gray clouds spread over the cloudy road.
The street is dull under the cloudy sky.
